title: Stellar Tweaks + Fresh Animations
description: Adds Fresh Animation compatibility for Stellar Tweaks (Load on top of both)
body:
## ST + FA is a a [fully customizable](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) resource pack that adds support for Fresh Animations with the Stellar Tweaks CEM models!
[![Requires Stellar Tweaks](https://i.postimg.cc/GprW0jtw/Requires-Stellar-Tweaks.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks)
[![Requires Fresh Animations](https://i.postimg.cc/zBQKh0H6/Requires-Fresh-Animations.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
#
Everything in this pack works **ONLY** when using [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or Optifine (Untested) and [Stellar Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks)

Requires [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) 1.10.5 or above, works on 26.1.x

<details><summary>Click here to see the proper load order</summary>
 
![Stellar Tweaks plus Fresh Animations then Stellar Tweaks then Fresh Animations](https://i.postimg.cc/260TKQbM/required-load-order.png)

</details>

#

*Want to talk? Check out our Discord! You can also check out the Trello for a list of what's planned!*
[![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/Bt9MMcSt/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8) [![Trello](https://i.postimg.cc/4nkBBbft/Trello.png)](https://trello.com/b/qqx0Nr14/minecraft-stellar-tweaks)

#
Disclaimer:

*The animations taken from [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations) in this pack maintain the same license as specified by [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), but the models and everything else not taken from [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) retains the same license as [Stellar Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks) does.*
#

## <u>Q & A</u>

<details><summary>Does this work?</summary>

Yes, if you have [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), or Optifine maybe. Dunno, never tested it.

</details>

<details><summary>What do I do if something is broken? </summary>

Report it on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8)! 

</details>

<details><summary>What about the silverfish from Stellar Tweaks???</summary>

Fresh Animations doesn't even touch the silverfish lol, if anything the ST one is already an improvement on the default.

</details>

# ARR License Exceptions

<details><summary>License Exceptions</summary>

- If you're here to see if you can use it in YT videos and the like and such, the answer is yes. Ideally pop a link in the description but that's not 100% required.

- You may add this resource pack to modpacks, but it must NOT be modified* and ideally credit is directly and clearly given in the description in the form of a link to the [source](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks) on Modrinth. (Required if not able to link in dependencies, such as not hosted on Modrinth)

*unless said modifications are directly approved by us, which may be asked for on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8).

*You can always just make a custom pack and override features via load order, in most cases there is no need to modify our pack unless you are editing sprite assets in which case yes you must ask for approval.

- If you're using our pack in a video please add a link to it in the description if possible.

- You may NOT smell the textures.

- We reserve the right to revoke any priveleges and/or exceptions (or the like) given for any reason from a specific group or individual or in its entirety.

*Everything we have written here precedes any exceptions given inside any version of the pack itself*

*Any exceptions not written here but included inside the pack itself should be considered not applicable, now null and void.*

#
Disclaimer Reminder:

*The animations taken from [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations) in this pack maintain the same license as specified by [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), but the models and everything else not taken from [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) retains the same license as [Stellar Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks) does.*

</details>


# 

[![Just look at the gallery already. Please. I beg of you.](https://i.imgur.com/REwTqjw.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks-fa/gallery)

[![Again, this requires Stellar Tweaks!](https://i.imgur.com/2ozuX0Z.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks)

[![Again, requires Fresh Animations](https://i.postimg.cc/zBQKh0H6/Requires-Fresh-Animations.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

#

The shader used in some screenshots is [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) using [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) in [Minecraft Java Edition](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us)
